text: do wow there are a lot of people here hmm i need to check in for my flight excuse me do you know where i can check in for my flight
oh hi you need to walk straight down then turn left you'll see the check encounters in front of you there is also a sign for it where are you flying to
thanks for your help i'm flying to rome is that the capital of italy that's right where are you flying to i'm going to london for a wedding that's
exciting well i better get going check-in closes 40 minutes before the flight
hi there i'd like to check in for my flight good morning where are you flying to today rome italy may i see your passport please
sure here you go how many bags are you checking in i've just got this one suitcase okay please place your suitcase on the scale
i have a stopover in london will i need to collect my luggage there no your luggage will be transferred to italy
so you will only need to pick it up when you get to italy here is your passport and your boarding passes
your flight leaves from gate b19 and it will begin boarding at 11 25 am your seat number is 14b you'll need to go through security next
enjoy your flight thank you for your help bye
excuse me is this security that's right please place your bag on the conveyor belt use the bins for small objects such as
your phone please also take off your shoes okay got it shall i walk through now yes please step back can you check your pockets for any small objects
ah i left my keys in my pocket sorry about that no problem come on through have a nice flight thank you  i'm not sure how to find the correct
gate excuse me can you please help me find the gate for my flight sure can you see the departures board up there
it shows you the boarding gate and time ah i can see it says my flight to rome is at 11 25 and the gate number is b19
exactly it also says that your flight is on time you're lucky my flight to new york is delayed oh i'm sorry to hear that thank you for your help
wow it's so empty here i guess not many people are flying because of the virus i still have 20 minutes left before i can get on the plane
i'm glad i made it here on time
good morning may i see your passport and boarding pass please of course here you go
thank you everything seems fine have a great flight thank you
welcome to italy may i see your passport hi sure here it is and here is my visa
thank you where do you live united states  please state your full name age and nationality my name is laura camp i am 26 years old
and i'm american oh it's interesting that you have a british accent yes that's because i lived in london for most of my childhood
but i was actually born and raised in the united states and what's the purpose of your visit to italy i'm going to visit my sister she lives in rome
how long do you plan to stay in rome about three weeks and what do you do back home sorry what do you mean by that your job what do you do oh
i don't have a job yet i'm a student at university your papers look fine you have a tourist visa for one month yes that's right i plan to explore rome
with my sister which tourist attractions are you planning to visit i'm not sure yet my sister is planning all that for us
all right do you have anything to declare pardon me what do you mean do you have any valuables to declare oh no i don't
have you brought any food into the country just some potatoes i bought in london during my stopover i'm afraid i'll have to take those
why they're just potatoes we don't allow meat dairy products and potatoes into the country ah all right here they are do you have anything else
just a handbag i bought for my sister as a gift that's fine anything else no that's all okay you can go ahead enjoy your stay in rome
thank you bye
wow that was a long journey now i need to collect my suitcase ah there it is i'm so excited to explore this beautiful country
hmm i wonder if it's cheaper to take a taxi or bus in rome i'll just take a taxi it'll be quicker hey taxi please take me to hotel locano  you
